content:
About HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth
The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation /income by investing predominantly in Small-Cap companies.
Strengths: Lower expense ratio: 0.76%; 1Y and 10Y annualised returns higher than category average
Weaknesses: 3Y and 5Y annualised returns lower than category average

content:
Exit Load & Tax for HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth
Exit Load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Stamp Duty: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020)
Lock-in Period: None
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.
Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Exit load of 2% if redeemed within 12 months, 1% if redeemed after 12 months but within 24 months and 0.50% if redeemed after 24 months but within 36 months
Exit load of 2% if redeemed within 12 months and 1% if redeemed after 12 months but before 18 months
Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Exit load, stamp duty and tax
Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Tax implication
If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

content:
Q: How to Invest in HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: You can easily invest in HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps: Log on to your Groww account Search for HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth from the search box In order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless and take a few minutes to complete Once you are done with that, you can start investing in HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your investment objective and risk tolerance

metadata.fund_name: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

content:
Q: How much expense ratio is charged by HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: The term Expense Ratio used for HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund. The Expense Ratio of HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is 0.76% as of 19 Jul 2026...

metadata.fund_name: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

content:
Q: How to Redeem HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: If you want to sell your HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

metadata.fund_name: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

content:
Q: What is the PE and PB ratio of HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: The PE ratio ratio of HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and the PB ratio of the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).
